MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES.

THE COURT TAKES PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim off calendar. The moving party did not appear and provide a valid Proof of Service as requested in the Court's tentative ruling. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted.
